title: シンボリの名を持つ者

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I drop by the racecourse on my day off and find
the track crowded with Umamusume, waiting at
the ready. Just then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A runner zips by in a flash. I recognize her... That's
Sirius Symboli.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her expression is fierce and filled with an
overwhelming thirst for victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once she passes the halfway point of the race,
she tears away from the competition and lands an
easy win for herself.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Followers
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Sirius! Your running today was nothing short
of fantastic, as always!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Hah, no need to make such a big deal. This race
was nothing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sirius Symboli is swept up in a storm of admirers
and reporters, who all shower her with praise.
However...

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations on your win! You won by such a
large margin!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
It appears the Symboli in your name isn't for
show! Will you be sharing the results of this race
with your childhood friend, Symboli Rudolf?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I get it. You're one of the Emperor's fans,
aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Why don't you tell her yourself? It's better than
wasting your time with me.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: Huh? No, that's not what I was implying!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The reporter scrambles to smooth things over but
is cowed by Sirius Symboli's ire and ends up
leaving the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf, the Emperor... It feels like the air
around Sirius Symboli dropped a few degrees
after she heard that name.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what's up with the sour looks? Don't you
have a celebration party in store for me?

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Followers
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes, of course! Let's make this a party to
remember!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Also...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
You there. You got something to say to me?
You've been staring a hole through me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Getting called out throws me for a loop, but I find
the right thing to respond with quickly.
choice_data_list: You're just as strong as the rumors say you are.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. It was obvious I was going to win. So, what
do you have for me?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
You're here to celebrate my success, aren't you?
So what are you going to do for me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I already congratulated her. What else does she
expect from me?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
choice_data_list:
(Maybe a bouquet would be more
appropriate?)

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Pfft... Hahaha! Don't get worked up over such a
simple question!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
I suppose those faces you pulled will do for
today. Don't let me down next time, though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I guess she's just messing with me. Sirius Symboli
leaves in a jovial mood after playing me for a
fool.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
As strong as the rumors say? That's a decent
compliment. But it's not good enough.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
What you should have said is that the rumors
didn't do me any justice.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
It looks like I need to teach you a few things
about manners. For instance... Yes, I know.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Lend me your ear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite being more than confused, I turn the side
of my face to her, thinking she has something to
tell me, but when I do...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She suddenly reaches for my ear and gently twists
it!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! That's how we Umamusume say hello.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
It's important to greet people properly. Make
sure you've mastered the right way to say hello
the next time we meet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That was bizarre... I'd never had someone do that
to me before, and the experience leaves my heart
racing for a while.
